source_match.notes: Metadata identity matches source bundle: IB DP Chemistry Guide, Published February 2023, First assessment 2025. Checksum and local archive ref recorded.

source_traceability.notes: All high-impact conclusions map to page-map references. SL/HL/AHL boundary file copied into references for boundary verification. Page references use printed/footer page numbers.

topic_tree.notes: 22 topics cover Structure 1-3 and Reactivity 1-3 strands with all subtopics from sl-hl-ahl-boundaries.json. Each subtopic has explicit level_scope (SL_HL_only / SL_HL_plus_AHL / AHL_only). topic_id stable and unique within skill.

assessment_model.notes: SL and HL Paper 1A/1B/2 structures, durations, marks, weightings, IA, AO1-AO4 mapping, command terms, difficulty ladder, confidence thresholds, and generation_constraints all present. lesson_use correctly disabled for v1.

out_of_scope.notes: Out-of-scope rules clear for pre-DP topics, AP Chemistry framework, and AHL-only content when target level is SL.

examples.notes: 3 correct classification, 2 misclassification, 2 out-of-scope, 1 cross-topic examples provided. Includes SL vs HL/AHL boundary example. Meets minimum requirement for classification use.

portability.notes: No platform-specific dependencies. SKILL.md and templates do not mention EduFlow, Feishu, ClaudeTeam or any runtime.

p2.issue: retrieved_at is 'unknown'; should be recorded when official source is re-downloaded or confirmed.

Parent topics (S1, S2, S3, R1, R2, R3) have classification_hints and common_misclassifications that overlap with subtopics; consider whether parent-level hints add distinct value or should be minimal.
AO weightings by paper are approximate (50/50 split); exact percentages are not specified in the subject guide.
Source extraction_confidence is medium (single-channel text extraction, same-agent review). Reviewer accepts this risk for validated status; independent re-review recommended before active.
